info.title: CreatorCrawl API
info.description: Scrape TikTok data at scale. Profiles, videos, comments, followers, trending content, and more.

apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
apiKeyAuth.description: API key from your CreatorCrawl dashboard

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Fetch TikTok profiles, followers, following, audience demographics, and live streams

tags.name: Video
tags.description: Scrape video data, comments, and transcripts

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search TikTok by keyword, hashtag, top results, or users

tags.name: Trending
tags.description: Get trending videos, hashtags, songs, and creators

tags.name: Song
tags.description: Get song details and videos using a song

get.description: Fetches a public TikTok profile by handle, including user info, stats, and recent videos.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle (e.g. stoolpresidente)

get.description: Scrapes videos from a TikTok profile. Pass max_cursor to paginate through results.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle (e.g. stoolpresidente)

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: TikTok user id. Use this for faster responses.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: What to sort by (latest or popular)

parameters.name: max_cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more videos. Get max_cursor from previous response.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region (Country) for the proxy. Defaults to US.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true for a trimmed down version of the response

get.description: Get the audience demographics of a TikTok user. Returns audience country distribution. Costs 26 credits per request.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle (e.g. shakira)

get.description: Scrapes followers of a TikTok account. Supports pagination via min_time.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle (e.g. stoolpresidente)

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User id. Use this for faster response times.

parameters.name: min_time
parameters.description: Used to paginate. Get min_time from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes accounts that a TikTok user follows. Supports pagination via min_time.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle (e.g. stoolpresidente)

parameters.name: min_time
parameters.description: Used to paginate. Get min_time from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes a TikTok user's live stream data including stream URLs, viewer count, and room info.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: TikTok handle (e.g. thejustalex)

get.description: Scrapes data from a TikTok video including author, statistics, video URLs, and more.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: TikTok video URL

parameters.name: get_transcript
parameters.description: Set to true to get the transcript of the video

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region of the proxy. Use 2 letter country codes like US, GB, FR, PH, etc.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes comments from a TikTok video. Supports pagination via cursor.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: TikTok video URL

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more comments. Get cursor from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes transcript from a TikTok video. Optionally specify language and AI fallback.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: TikTok video URL

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language of the transcript. 2 letter language code, e.g. 'en', 'es', 'fr', 'de', 'it', 'ja', 'ko', 'zh'

parameters.name: use_ai_as_fallback
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to use AI as a fallback if the transcript is not found. Only works for videos under 2 minutes.

get.description: Scrapes TikTok videos matching a keyword. Supports sorting, date filtering, and pagination.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword to search for

parameters.name: date_posted
parameters.description: Time frame filter

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region for the proxy (2 letter country code e.g. US, GB)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more videos. Get cursor from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Scrapes TikTok videos by hashtag. Supports pagination via cursor.

parameters.name: hashtag
parameters.description: Hashtag to search for (without #)

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region the proxy will be set to (e.g. US)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more videos. Get cursor from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: TikTok Top search results including both videos and photo carousels. Unlike keyword search which only returns videos.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword to search for

parameters.name: publish_time
parameters.description: Time frame filter

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region for the proxy (2 letter country code e.g. US, GB)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more results. Get cursor from previous response.

200.description: TikTok top search results (videos + photo carousels)

get.description: Scrapes TikTok users matching a search query. Supports pagination via cursor.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query for users

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get more users. Get cursor from previous response.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Get the trending feed from TikTok, filtered by region.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Proxy region. Use 2 letter country codes like US, GB, FR, etc.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true to get a trimmed response

get.description: Get popular videos from TikTok. Filter by time period, country, and sort by likes, views, comments, or reposts.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in days (7 or 30)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Sort by likes, views (hot), comments, or reposts

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: Country code (e.g. US, GB)

get.description: Get popular creators from TikTok. Filter by follower count, creator country, audience country, and sort by engagement, follower count, or average views.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort creators by engagement, follower count, or average views

parameters.name: followerCount
parameters.description: Filter by follower count range

parameters.name: creatorCountry
parameters.description: Country code of the creator (e.g. US, GB)

parameters.name: audienceCountry
parameters.description: Country code of the audience/follower (e.g. US, GB)

get.description: Get popular hashtags from TikTok. Filter by time period, country, and show newly trending hashtags.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period in days (7, 30, or 120)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: Country code (e.g. US, GB, FR, DE, JP, KR, BR, etc.)

parameters.name: newOnBoard
parameters.description: Show only newly trending hashtags

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Industry filter (e.g. beauty-and-personal-care, food-and-beverage, tech-and-electronics)

get.description: Get popular songs from TikTok. This endpoint can take up to 30 seconds.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: timePeriod
parameters.description: Time period to get popular songs from

parameters.name: rankType
parameters.description: Get popular or surging songs

parameters.name: newOnBoard
parameters.description: New to top 100

parameters.name: commercialMusic
parameters.description: Approved for business use

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: Country code (e.g. US, GB, DE)

get.description: Scrapes details from a TikTok song/clip.

parameters.name: clipId
parameters.description: The clip ID (not the song ID)

get.description: Get the TikTok videos that use a specific song/clip.

parameters.name: clipId
parameters.description: The clip ID from the song URL

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination to get the next page of results
